decision.archive_summary: Durable editor facts: user previously used Vim as the default editor, then updated their current default editor to Zed. A brief detour asked why shadow mode is off by default; it was answered as a conservative default and is no longer relevant to the active topic.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic switched back from a resolved shadow-mode detour to the editor fact lookup. The latest turn depends on the durable editor-state facts, which can be preserved as compact pins rather than raw turns. The shadow-mode exchange is solved and off-topic, so it is a strong eviction candidate. Keeping pins for both the historical Vim fact and the updated current Zed fact preserves the needed memory while shrinking the next-turn raw prompt.
